listitem.para: What are the primary principles and practice of Santeria?
What is meant by simpatia, personalismo, and choteo? How are they displayed by Cubans?
Explain the extensive name format used by Cubans.
Name at least three health conditions common among Cubans.
Identify at least three folk beliefs about pregnancy common to Cubans.
What are some common amulets used by Cubans to teat ailments?
A female Cuban new diabetic patient wants to use herbs to control her diabetes. Would you encourage her to try herbs rather than allopathic treatments? Why or why not?
What is a botanica? Is there one in your community?
Identify ways in which to integrate religious practices and preferences into the patient’s health-care plan.
What is the most important source of emotional and physical support for most Cubans?
